human_approval_required_for: publishing a new skill (validator must pass first)
deviating from the documented standard (requires updating standard.md)

scripts.validate: scripts/validate-skills.py — Python audit script for the entire skill catalog

boundaries.produces: skill standard documentation, validator script, RED-GREEN-REFACTOR discipline for skill authoring
boundaries.does_not_produce: automatic skill rewrites — author decides what to fix; this skill only audits and prescribes
boundaries.does_not_handle: workflow orchestration (use the workflow skills), domain decisions about devloop itself
